description_public: A polygenic estimate related to muscle power vs endurance tendency variation in the general population.

RR.notes: This genotype is associated with the presence of functional α-actinin-3 protein in fast-twitch muscle fibers and is more common in strength and power athletes, although training and lifestyle still have a major influence.

RX.notes: This genotype is associated with an intermediate pattern of α-actinin-3 expression and is often seen as a mix between power and endurance tendencies, with training strongly shaping performance.

XX.notes: This genotype leads to a lack of α-actinin-3 in fast-twitch fibers and is somewhat more common in endurance-oriented athletes, though overall fitness still depends heavily on training, health, and environment.

evidence.title: Placeholder evidence for Muscle power vs endurance tendency
evidence.quote: This genotype is associated with the presence of functional α-actinin-3 protein in fast-twitch muscle fibers and is more common in strength and power athletes, although training and lifestyle still have a major influence.
